home-intro.title: Experience refined living across unique destinations
home-intro.message:
Mocca Living is a collection of carefully designed living spaces, offering refined stays that combine elegance, privacy, and modern amenities.

Mocca by the Sea, in Agia Paraskevi Makri, offers two elegant villas with private gardens, a mini pool with hydromassage, and direct access to the beach — ideal for those seeking tranquility and an authentic seaside experience away from everyday life. Mocca City, on Leoforos Dimokratias in the heart of Alexandroupolis, features a fully renovated apartment with views over the city's main avenue and easy access to shops, restaurants, the seafront promenade, and the port.

reason1.title: Families
reason1.description: Mocca Living offers comfortable and well-equipped accommodations, perfect for families looking to enjoy quality time together in a relaxing and convenient setting.

reason2.title: Friends
reason2.description: Gather with friends for a memorable stay at Mocca Living, where shared experiences and moments of relaxation create lasting memories.

reason3.title: VIP Guests
reason3.description: Experience privacy, comfort, and attentive service at Mocca Living, designed for guests who appreciate a refined and exclusive environment.

reason4.title: Couples
reason4.description: Mocca Living is a welcoming and serene space for couples seeking a peaceful getaway, offering a relaxing atmosphere for shared moments.

reason5.title: Wellness & Relaxation
reason5.description: Whether for short stays or extended retreats, Mocca Living provides a calm and comfortable environment ideal for rest, wellness, and slow-living.

home-locations.title: Distances to key locations
home-locations.description: Explore distances to key locations for each Mocca Living property.

mocca-sea.title: Mocca by the Sea
mocca-sea.description: Ideal for a relaxing seaside stay, just steps from the beach with easy access to nearby amenities.

charging_station.title: Car charging station ~80 m
charging_station.description: At 80 meters, a charging station serves electric vehicles, providing a practical and reliable solution for convenient daily transportation without hassle.

beach.title: Agia Paraskevi beach ~100 m
beach.description: Just 100 meters away, Agia Paraskevi Beach offers clear waters and ideal conditions for relaxation, swimming, and sunbathing by the sea.

restaurant.title: Closest restaurant ~100 m
restaurant.description: Within 100 meters, the nearest restaurant offers a pleasant dining experience with a selection of local and international dishes in a comfortable setting.

city.title: Alexandroupoli ~14 km
city.description: At a distance of 14 km, Alexandroupoli combines modern amenities with local character, featuring a lively seafront, restaurants, and shops for visitors to explore.

airport.title: Airport ~20 km
airport.description: Dimokritos Airport, located 20 km from the properties, offers convenient access for domestic and international travelers, ensuring smooth and comfortable arrivals and departures.

mocca-city.title: Mocca City
mocca-city.description: Perfect for staying in the heart of Alexandroupoli, with everything within walking distance.

city_center.title: City center
city_center.description: Located directly on Dimokratias Avenue, the apartment sits in the very center of Alexandroupoli, surrounded by shops, cafes, and everyday amenities, allowing guests to fully experience the city's vibrant atmosphere without the need for transportation.

bus_station.title: Bus station ~300 m
bus_station.description: The central bus station is just a short walk away, offering easy and reliable connections to nearby areas and regional destinations, making day trips simple and accessible.

seafront.title: Seafront promenade ~500 m
seafront.description: Within a short and pleasant walk, guests can reach the city’s seafront promenade, ideal for relaxing strolls, seaside dining, and enjoying the coastal atmosphere that defines Alexandroupoli.

port.title: Port of Alexandroupoli ~1 km
port.description: Approximately 1 km away, the port area offers a lively setting with restaurants, cafes, and connections to nearby destinations, making it a great spot for both leisure and exploration.

airport.title: Airport ~7 km
airport.description: Located around 7 km from the apartment, Dimokritos Airport provides convenient access for both arrivals and departures, ensuring a smooth and comfortable travel experience.

intro.title: Our Exclusive Accommodations
intro.message: Experience ultimate luxury at Mocca Living, where our exclusive accommodations perfectly blend modern comfort with timeless elegance. Each property is carefully designed to offer an unforgettable stay, whether you're here for a family vacation, a getaway with friends, or a romantic retreat. Indulge in luxury and discover the perfect balance between relaxation and refined aesthetics in a space that promises to make every moment unique.

sea-dimitra.title: Dimitra
sea-dimitra.description: Embrace the luxury of villa Dimitra in Makri, an 85m² sanctuary for 2-4 adults and 2 children. With 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, it's ideal for a relaxed, elegant stay.

sea-georgia.title: Georgia
sea-georgia.description: Discover villa Georgia in Makri, a charming 45m² haven for 2-4 adults and 1 child. With 2 bedrooms and a modern bathroom, perfect for a cozy escape near the sea.

city-dimitra.title: Dimitra
city-dimitra.description: Discover Dimitra in Alexandroupolis, a fully renovated 50m² apartment for 2 adults and 2 children. With 1 bedroom, a sofa bed, and views over Leoforos Dimokratias.

contact-form.title: Contact us
contact-form.description: Fill out the form below to make a booking, and we will contact you shortly.

terms.title: General terms
terms.description: Our website moccaliving.com safeguards the personal nature of your information and cannot disclose it to any third party (natural or legal entity) for any reason, except for relevant legal provisions and solely to the competent authorities. We reserve the right to disclose your personally identifiable information as required by law and when we believe that disclosure is necessary to protect our rights and/or comply with a judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on our website. Our website moccaliving.com keeps records of personal information that visitors exclusively submit for communication purposes. Visitors can contact the appropriate department to verify the existence of their personal file, correct it, change it, or delete it. Visitors or users of our website moccaliving.com who are minors have access to its services only with the consent of their parents or guardians and are not obliged to submit their personal information. In case such information is submitted by minors and if the fact becomes known to us, our company deletes all related information. Our business, particularly the marketing department, may process part or all of the information you have submitted for statistical and improvement purposes of the provided services and information. As our business continues to evolve by introducing new products, our Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. We will only use your personal information in accordance with the Privacy Policy in effect at the time we collected your personal information.

agreement.title: User agreement
agreement.description: The visitor of the pages and services of our website moccaliving.com grants their consent to the above terms of use, which apply to the entirety of the content, pages, graphics, images, photographs, and files included on the website. Therefore, they should carefully read these terms before visiting or using the pages and services of the moccaliving.com website. If they do not agree, they should refrain from using the services and content of the website. The visitor is requested to check the content of these pages for any possible changes. The continued use of the moccaliving.com website, even after any changes, signifies the visitor's unconditional acceptance of these terms.

content-1.description: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites function properly, enhance user experience, and provide analytical insights. Cookies can be categorized into different types based on their purpose:
content-1.bullet-1: Essential Cookies - Required for the website to function properly.
content-1.bullet-2: Performance Cookies - Help analyze how visitors use the website to improve its functionality.
content-1.bullet-3: Functional Cookies - Enhance user experience by remembering preferences (e.g., language settings).
content-1.bullet-4: Marketing Cookies - Used for advertising and tracking user behavior across different websites.

content-2.bullet-1: CONSENT_COOKIE - This cookie is stored to deliver a better user experience and analyze website traffic.
content-2.bullet-2: NEXT_LOCALE - This cookie is used for internalization purposes, ensuring the website displays the correct language based on user preferences.

item-1.title: Smoking prohibited indoors
item-1.description: To ensure a fresh and comfortable environment for all guests, smoking is strictly prohibited inside the property. Guests who wish to smoke may do so in outdoor areas.

item-2.title: Quiet hours & noise policy
item-2.description: To ensure the peace and comfort of all our guests, kindly note that playing music or making loud noises, including raised voices, is strictly prohibited between 14:30 - 17:30 and after 23:00. Your cooperation is essential in maintaining a serene and enjoyable environment for everyone.

item-3.title: Pets are not permitted
item-3.description: We strive to maintain a high standard of cleanliness and comfort for all guests. For this reason, pets are not permitted within the accommodation or on the surrounding property. We kindly ask for your understanding, as this policy helps us ensure an allergy-free environment and preserve the serene atmosphere of the accommodation.
